dialogueLines.dialogueText: Hey, kid! You think you can just waltz in here and challenge us old-timers?
We were here before you and we'll be here long after you're gone.
Just 'cause I'm old doesn't mean I can't fend off you young up-and-comers.
You got more spirit than I gave you credit for, kid. Maybe it's time for me to put the drill down.
Granny, though, she's tougher than me. Fighting her is a real pain in the cheeks.
I would know. I fought her every day we were married, and I never did win. But maybe you will.
